## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/check_repository.py` passes.
- [ ] New behavior has regression coverage.
- [ ] Source rows include provenance, geography, rights, and access restrictions.
- [ ] Community proposals remain `pending`; I did not self-assign authority or review.
- [ ] Generated `data/sources.json` and `data/sources.jsonl` are updated when catalogs changed.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, copied reports, or credentials are included.
